primary_invariant_en: Execution is observable before it is trustworthy.
primary_invariant_ar: التنفيذ قابل للمراقبة قبل أن يصبح موثوقًا.
first_sandbox_invariant_en: Visible execution is not equivalent to validated execution.
first_sandbox_invariant_ar: التنفيذ المرئي لا يعادل التنفيذ المُ validated.
supreme_risk_ar: انجراف ثقة المحاكاة — window · movement · frames · telemetry · replay → game confirmed
protective_ambiguity_en: Empty runtime_observation_ledger is intentional — telemetry presence does not mean the system understands the game.
not_goal: if exe ran then runtime truth

execution_phenomenology.purpose_en: Describe what appeared during execution — not what it means.
execution_phenomenology.purpose_ar: يصف ما ظهر أثناء التشغيل — لا ما يعنيه.
execution_phenomenology.forbidden_escalation_principle_en: Phenomenology may never auto-escalate to legitimacy claims.

provenance_requirements.note_en: Provenance must be traceable before any trust language — observation chain ≠ validation chain

simulation_confidence_drift_watch.psychological_risk_en: Observer feels game is confirmed despite missing corroboration · identity binding · gameplay understanding · provenanced replay
simulation_confidence_drift_watch.mitigation_en: execution phenomenology layer · forbidden escalation table · ledger empty-by-default discipline

constitutional_epistemics_transfer_en: Transfer constitutional epistemics from linguistic domain to runtime execution domain.
